notes: Read-only discovery endpoints remain public and do not consume the free tier.
The free tier covers 1000 executions per month before paid Rhumb billing applies.

rhumb_managed.label: Rhumb-managed billing
notes: Rhumb-managed billing charges upstream cost plus a 20 percent margin.
Exact per-call estimates are available from the execute estimate endpoint.

x402.label: x402 / USDC
notes: Current public x402 payment support is USDC on Base only.
Exact payment instructions are returned on HTTP 402 for each execution.

byok.label: Bring your own key
byok.passthrough_note: Rhumb adds no markup in BYOK mode. Provider charges bill directly to your provider account.
notes: BYOK keeps billing with the upstream provider.
Rhumb does not add a markup to BYOK usage.
Volume discount tiers are not final and are intentionally omitted from this pricing contract.
Token expansion beyond USDC is not final. Current public x402 support is USDC on Base only.
